name_en: Premium Hardware Original Leather ~ Imported Calfskin Charm
name_cn:
Premium Hardware Original Leather ~ Imported Calfskin Charm
This charm adds a unique touch to other accessories. It features a embossed logo, adding a signature element.
- Strap closure
- Zipper closure
- Embossed letter logo
- Lined
Size: w11×h7×d4cm
No.: 5NR036 _ 020 _ MM030
